Set_varCalculationDetails_Count.description: Calculate number of records that have been taken. As soon as no more records are taken the Do-until action stops.

Set_Update_Values.description: Based on Trigger Input 'ActivateCalculation' the records are either update with Status and Status Reason "Active" or "Inactive"
